Sergey Kud-Sverchkov.extract: Sergey Vladimirovich Kud-Sverchkov is a Russian cosmonaut. He first flew to space in October 2020 aboard Soyuz MS-17 for Expedition 63/64. He returned for his second mission in November 2025 as part of Expedition 74. He has completed 2 EVAs and over 367 total days in space.

Christopher Williams.extract: Christopher Williams is a NASA astronaut on his first spaceflight, having launched to the ISS in November 2025 as part of Expedition 74 aboard Soyuz MS-28. He is scheduled to return in summer 2026.

Sergey Mikayev.extract: Sergey Mikayev is a Russian cosmonaut on his first spaceflight, launching to the ISS in November 2025 aboard Soyuz MS-28 for Expedition 74. He has completed 1 EVA during his mission and is scheduled to return in summer 2026.

Jessica Meir.description: NASA astronaut and marine biologist · SpaceX Crew-12
Jessica Meir.extract: Jessica Ulrika Meir is a NASA astronaut and marine biologist. During her first mission in 2019-2020 she and Christina Koch conducted the first all-female spacewalk in history. She returned to the ISS in February 2026 as commander of SpaceX Crew-12, part of Expedition 74/75. She has completed 3 EVAs across her missions.

Jack Hathaway.extract: Jack Hathaway is a NASA astronaut and former U.S. Navy test pilot on his first spaceflight. He serves as pilot of SpaceX Crew-12, which launched to the ISS on February 13, 2026 as part of Expedition 74/75.

Andrey Fedyaev.extract: Andrey Ivanovich Fedyaev is a Russian cosmonaut who first flew to space in March 2023 aboard SpaceX Crew-6. He returned to the ISS in February 2026 as a mission specialist on SpaceX Crew-12 for Expedition 74/75, accumulating over 290 total days in space.

Andrei Fedyaev.extract: Andrey Ivanovich Fedyaev is a Russian cosmonaut who first flew to space in March 2023 aboard SpaceX Crew-6. He returned to the ISS in February 2026 as a mission specialist on SpaceX Crew-12 for Expedition 74/75, accumulating over 290 total days in space.

Sophie Adenot.description: ESA astronaut, French Air Force test pilot · SpaceX Crew-12
Sophie Adenot.extract: Sophie Adenot is a French ESA astronaut and former French Air Force helicopter test pilot, selected as an ESA astronaut in 2022. She launched on her first spaceflight in February 2026 as a mission specialist on SpaceX Crew-12 for Expedition 74/75.

Anil Menon.description: NASA astronaut, physician & Space Force colonel · Soyuz MS-29
Anil Menon.extract: Anil Menon is a NASA astronaut, emergency medicine physician, and colonel in the U.S. Space Force. Born and raised in Minneapolis, he was selected as a NASA astronaut in 2021 and graduated from the 23rd astronaut class in 2024. He launches on his first spaceflight aboard Soyuz MS-29 on July 14, 2026 for Expeditions 74/75, with an 8-month stay planned.

Pyotr Dubrov.description: Russian cosmonaut, Roscosmos · Soyuz MS-29 commander
Pyotr Dubrov.extract: Pyotr Valerievich Dubrov is a Russian cosmonaut who previously flew on Soyuz MS-18 in 2021-2022, spending 355 days aboard the ISS. He commands Soyuz MS-29, launching July 14, 2026, for his second long-duration mission as part of Expeditions 74/75.

Anna Kikina.extract: Anna Yurievna Kikina is a Russian cosmonaut and the only active female cosmonaut in Roscosmos. She previously flew on SpaceX Crew-5 in 2022-2023. She launches aboard Soyuz MS-29 on July 14, 2026 for her second mission as part of Expeditions 74/75.

Jessica Watkins.description: NASA astronaut and geologist · SpaceX Crew-13 commander
Jessica Watkins.extract: Jessica Watkins is a NASA astronaut and geologist who previously flew on SpaceX Crew-4 in 2022, becoming the first Black woman to live and work long-term aboard the ISS. She commands SpaceX Crew-13, launching no earlier than mid-September 2026, becoming the first NASA astronaut to fly a Crew Dragon twice.

Luke Delaney.description: NASA astronaut, U.S. Navy test pilot · SpaceX Crew-13 pilot
Luke Delaney.extract: Luke Delaney is a NASA astronaut and former U.S. Navy test pilot from Volusia County, Florida. Selected as a NASA astronaut in 2021, he pilots SpaceX Crew-13 on his first spaceflight, targeting launch in mid-September 2026 for Expedition 75/76.

Joshua Kutryk.description: CSA astronaut, Canadian fighter pilot · SpaceX Crew-13
Joshua Kutryk.extract: Joshua Kutryk is a Canadian Space Agency astronaut and former CF-18 fighter pilot from Alberta. Selected as a CSA astronaut in 2017, he holds master's degrees in space studies, flight test engineering, and defense studies. He flies as a mission specialist on SpaceX Crew-13 in September 2026, his first spaceflight.

Sergey Teteryatnikov.extract: Sergey Teteryatnikov is a Russian cosmonaut and test cosmonaut since 2023, with a background as a naval engineer specializing in ship power plants and undersea vessels. He flies as a mission specialist on SpaceX Crew-13 in September 2026, his first spaceflight, as part of Expedition 75/76.
